Primary JTBD: When I start a new job, I want to understand my health coverage, so I can feel secure about my family's protection
Secondary JTBDs:
• Know who is covered under my policy
• Understand what medical expenses are covered
• Get my e-card quickly to use at hospitals
Anxiety Points:
• Is this coverage enough for my family?
• What happens if I need expensive treatment?
• Are my parents covered?
Education Moments:
• What is Sum Insured and how it works
• Who is covered (family definition)
• How to use e-card for cashless claims
Flow Layers Shown: L0 → L1 → L2 (view) → L6
Content Designer Input:
Headline: "Your health coverage is ready"
Subtext: "[Company] has you covered"
CTA: "View your coverage"
Tooltips: Sum Insured, Floater, Cashless
Reassurance: "No action needed - you're already protected"

Primary JTBD: When my employer provides additional coverage options, I want to see what's included, so I know the full value of my benefits
Secondary JTBDs:
• Understand base + top-up coverage
• See total protection amount
• Know this is fully paid by employer
Anxiety Points:
• Is the top-up automatic or do I need to do something?
• What's the difference between base and top-up?
Education Moments:
• What is a top-up and how it extends coverage
• Combined coverage calculation
• When top-up kicks in
Flow Layers Shown: L0 → L1 → L2 (view) → L4 (view) → L6
Content Designer Input:
Headline: "Your enhanced coverage"
Subtext: "Base + Top-up provided by [Company]"
Top-up explanation: "Extra ₹X kicks in after base is used"
CTA: "View your benefits"

Primary JTBD: When I have employer insurance, I want to add more protection, so I can cover higher medical expenses
Secondary JTBDs:
• Compare top-up options and costs
• Understand cost vs benefit trade-off
• Make an informed investment decision

• Is the top-up worth the monthly cost?
• What does it actually cover beyond base?
• Can I change my decision later?

• Whether to purchase top-up (Yes/No)
• Which top-up tier to select
Education Moments:
• What is top-up and when it's useful
• How premium is deducted from salary
• Top-up claim process

Headline: "Enhance your coverage"
